title: Permission element inner div with style text-emphasis:꧁; and text-emphasis-position: over right; can be abused if no element in the parent chain has any text-emphasis:꧁; and text-emphasis-position: over right; are set.
bounty_rationale: $1,000 comprehensive reward for multiple reports of this low impact security UI issue in various places in Permission Element (for issue 428455319, 429440615, 433820888, 437510229, and not yet resolved issues 429270814 and 425159951)
description_snippet:
This bug is similar to 
https://issues.chromium.org/issues/398803201, 
https://issues.chromium.org/issues/423670839

when text-emphasis:꧁; and text-emphasis-position: over right; are embedded in a tag above the <permission> tag, for example a div or something else, this affects the <permission> tag,
